subject: feat: add distinct notification icon for undetermined permission state
body:
Previously, the undetermined state (user not yet asked) showed the same icon (🔕) as the denied state (user blocked notifications), causing confusion.

Now each permission state has a clear visual indicator:
- ⏳ Loading: Checking permission status
- 🔔 Undetermined: Not yet asked - invites user to enable
- ✅ Granted: Notifications enabled and working
- 🔕 Denied: Notifications blocked - tap for system settings instructions

This improves UX by clearly distinguishing between "ready to enable" and "blocked" states.
title: add distinct notification icon for undetermined permission state
